decisions.briefing: Markets are in risk-off mode today with the NASDAQ down 1.3% and S&P 500 down 0.7%. The screener returned zero candidates, which is a clear signal to sit on hands. With a 24.6% total gain on the portfolio, capital preservation is the priority — holding all six positions and letting stop-losses do their job if anything deteriorates further.

market_education.summary_en: Markets sold off broadly today in a risk-off session, with tech-heavy NASDAQ falling 1.3% and the broader S&P 500 sliding 0.7%. Risk-off moves typically occur when investors grow cautious about the economic outlook or face uncertainty from macro events such as inflation data, Fed commentary, or geopolitical developments. In these conditions, money tends to rotate out of growth equities into safer assets like bonds, gold, and cash, which is why the momentum screener returned no actionable candidates.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場普遍出現避險情緒，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數下跌1.3%，標普500指數也回落0.7%。避險情緒通常在投資者對宏觀前景感到不確定時升溫，例如通脹數據超預期、聯儲局發表鷹派言論或地緣政治風險升溫等情況。在這種市場環境下，資金傾向撤離成長型股票，轉向債券、黃金及現金等防守性資產，亦是今日動能選股系統未能篩選出任何買入機會的原因。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-off is a market condition where investors collectively reduce their exposure to higher-risk assets like growth stocks and move toward safer havens like bonds, gold, or cash. It usually happens when uncertainty spikes — think inflation scares, Fed policy shifts, or geopolitical tensions. In a risk-off environment, even solid stocks can fall simply because the broad sentiment turns negative.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險情緒」（Risk-Off）是指市場整體轉趨保守，投資者從高風險資產（如成長股）撤離，轉向債券、黃金或現金等避風港。這種情況通常在不確定性上升時出現，例如通脹數據升溫、聯儲局政策轉向或地緣政治局勢緊張。在避險市況下，即使基本面良好的股票也可能因整體情緒轉差而下跌。
